title: Self-evolving AI, robot fights, new GPT voice, new local image model, Gemma upgrade: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a video roundup of recent AI developments including HiDream-O1 Image, Gemma 4 MTP, GPT Realtime 2, AlphaEvolve, Bach 1.0, and robotic systems like Gene 26.5 and Unitree robots. The video highlights self-evolving AI approaches, multimodal tools, and advances in robotics across the AI landscape.
